_meta.title: Planet → Treatment Channel (the 5-sense spine under the composer)
_meta.lineage: Medical-astrology tradition — each planet's classical mode of remedy (its 'treatment type'). Distilled, attributed to the tradition. Sound/vibration therapy is classically a Neptune–Uranus practice — the whole instrument has a documented home.
_meta.note: Maps the corrective/regulator planet to the sense channels Astryx already calibrates (Sound · Scent · Taste · Body · Sight). Surfaced behind Astryx, never as a clinical claim.

channels.note: comfort, ease, softening — the cooling hand
warming, mobilizing — used to thaw the cold/blocked
nervous-system pacing — breath and nervine herbs
sound/vibration therapy is a Neptune–Uranus practice — the tuning fork's own home
frequency/vibration — co-home of sound therapy with Neptune
mineral and grounding — the master regulator, the balance wheel
fluids and rhythm — hydration and settling
light and warmth — restoring vitality to the depleted
deep release — for the held/stagnant, gently
